posts.author: Chavez210 (Sam Chavez)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I am new to Monday. I am familiar with CMMS usage. I worked with Emaint which is a CMMS made by Fluke. Used it for over 6 years. Now at a different company i am using Monday which seems great but i am having trouble navigating it. Is there a simple way to create asset lists and Preventative maintenance work orders, not just work order request page. I will continue to look for myself also but any info will help. Thank you.
